status.lastDumping: Sean Reifel (Day 6) — left single after recoupling
status.pendingVote: First America's Vote results DELAYED to Ep 9 (app technical issues) — bombshell recoupling still looms

islanders.name: Trinity Tatum
islanders.traits: Self-assured, playful and unafraid to flirt; calls herself 'the prize.'
islanders.strength: Knows what she wants and goes for it; brings high energy.
islanders.crit: Some viewers find the 'prize' confidence a touch much early on.
islanders.story: Picked Bryce on night one as the only woman to choose him; rode out the Day 5 recoupling together and kissed every boy in the paint challenge before locking onto him.

islanders.name: Bryce Dettloff
islanders.traits: Laid-back, sweet and steady; the calm one of the villa.
islanders.strength: Patient and understanding — handled Trinity's mixed signals gracefully.
islanders.crit: Low-drama style can read as passive to some fans.
islanders.story: The oldest original islander; chosen by Trinity night one and has been a reassuring constant for her since.

islanders.name: Gabriel Vasconcelos
islanders.traits: Trilingual charmer bringing 'Brazilian fire'; making out is his love language.
islanders.strength: Warm and reassuring — comforts Beatriz in Portuguese/Spanish.
islanders.crit: Beatriz worries he may chase the next shiny new arrival.
islanders.story: Left single on night one (odd man out), then picked by Beatriz at the Day 5 recoupling to form a brand-new couple.

islanders.name: Beatriz Hatz
islanders.traits: Paralympic bronze medalist (long jump T64); confident but introspective.
islanders.strength: Self-aware and direct about what she needs from a partner.
islanders.crit: Can spiral into insecurity about not being 'soft and feminine' enough.
islanders.story: Coupled with Sean on night one, but switched to Gabriel at the Day 5 recoupling — a move that left Sean single and dumped.

islanders.name: Sincere Rhea
islanders.traits: Cheesy, name-proud flirt who 'likes the chase'; wears his emotions openly.
islanders.strength: Communicative and willing to work through conflict.
islanders.crit: Quick to anger and jealousy — bristled at Melanie's paint-challenge antics.
islanders.story: Chose Melanie over Aniya night one; the pair have been volatile but keep finding their way back ('all roads lead to Rome').

islanders.name: Melanie Moreno
islanders.traits: Brings Dominican flair; bold, flirty and not afraid to stir the pot.
islanders.strength: Magnetic and expressive; keeps things exciting.
islanders.crit: The drawn-out paint-challenge kiss with Corbin read as messy to viewers.
islanders.story: Wanted by both boys night one and chose Sincere; their up-and-down dynamic is one of the season's central storylines.

islanders.name: KC Chandler
islanders.traits: Cheeky healthcare worker who jokes 'women love men in scrubs.'
islanders.strength: Easygoing humor and a settled night-one connection with Aniya.
islanders.crit: Joked about feeling 'blessed' by the new bombshells — and got shut down by Aniya.
islanders.story: Paired with Aniya as the last two standing night one; stable until the bombshell comment caused friction on Day 6.

islanders.name: Aniya Harvey
islanders.traits: Daughter of NBA player Donnell Harvey; 'a bit competitive' but friendly and 'so extra.'
islanders.strength: Direct — names disrespect the moment she feels it.
islanders.crit: Some see the competitive streak flaring early.
islanders.story: Wanted Sincere night one but he chose Melanie, leaving her to pair with KC. Pushed back hard on KC's bombshell joke Day 6.

islanders.name: Zach Georgiou
islanders.traits: British charm; brother of S7 bombshell Charlie Georgiou. Has a cat named Lolo.
islanders.strength: Settled quickly and makes his partner feel secure.
islanders.crit: Came in to 'do better' — fans waiting to see real depth.
islanders.story: Coupled with Kenzie night one, but lost her to bombshell Corbin at the recoupling — then immediately locked in with bombshell Kayda.

islanders.name: Kayda Reese Bosse
islanders.traits: Former HS basketball shooting guard (5'9"); left NYC modeling for a slower pace.
islanders.strength: Grounded and warm; brings calm certainty to her couple.
islanders.crit: Entered as a bombshell — some fans wary of how fast she locked in.
islanders.story: Bombshell who arrived in premiere week and chose Zach at the Day 5 recoupling; the two look 'locked in.'

islanders.name: Corbin Mims
islanders.traits: Fitness content creator and co-owner of a Turks & Caicos villa-rental business; Stetson marketing grad.
islanders.strength: Decisive and confident — 'the power was in my hands.'
islanders.crit: Broke up a fan-favorite couple on arrival; seen as a disruptor.
islanders.story: Bombshell who picked Kenzie first at the Day 5 recoupling, ending her couple with Zach and creating a new pairing.

islanders.name: Kenzie Annis
islanders.traits: Graduated nursing school two days before the villa; 'starving for some boys' after 18 months single.
islanders.strength: Open about wanting a big family and a real future.
islanders.crit: Swapped from Zach to Corbin fast — some question the whiplash.
islanders.story: Coupled with Zach night one, then chosen by bombshell Corbin at the Day 5 recoupling.

islanders.name: Sol Mýa
islanders.traits: Fashion model who also paints, writes and sings; 'doesn't have a problem getting guys.'
islanders.strength: Fearless and competitive — comes to win.
islanders.crit: Openly there 'to take one of their men.'
islanders.story: Stormed the Day 6 slumber-party challenge in red paint and singled out Corbin, KC and Sincere.

islanders.name: Jen Terry
islanders.traits: Pro model (Guess, SKIMS, Tecovas) working NY/LA/Miami.
islanders.strength: Knows her worth and is upfront about her intentions.
islanders.crit: 'There to take one of their men' — instant threat to the girls.
islanders.story: Entered Day 6 right after Sol, kissing the chained-up boys before the blindfolds came off.

islanders.name: Caleb McDaniel
islanders.traits: Charleston-based model (Home Depot campaigns) and gym devotee.
islanders.strength: Youthful energy; the girls were quick to gravitate to him.
islanders.crit: Youngest in the villa — unproven so far.
islanders.story: The night's surprise third bombshell on Day 6, cut loose to meet the women immediately.

islanders.name: Sean Reifel
islanders.traits: Police officer and dad to a young son; the steady, caring type.
islanders.strength: Emotionally supportive — 'I'll help you sift through it.'
islanders.crit: Couldn't build a strong enough connection to survive the first vote.
islanders.story: Coupled with Beatriz night one, but she chose Gabriel at the Day 5 recoupling, leaving Sean single. Dumped from the villa Day 6.

islanders.name: Vasana Montgomery
islanders.traits: Originally cast as an OG islander.
islanders.story: Removed from the cast before entering the villa (May 29) after videos surfaced of her using racist language. Never appeared in the villa.

couples.how: Trinity was the only woman to pick Bryce on night one, making them the first official couple of the season.
couples.events: The season's steadiest pair — until Day 8, when Bryce told Zach he wanted to pull bombshell Kayda for a chat and 'explore the connection,' the first real wobble in this couple.

couples.how: Beatriz chose Gabriel at the Day 5 girls' recoupling, leaving Sean single.
couples.events: Beatriz's worst fear landed on Day 8: Gabriel admitted he'd chatted with BOTH new bombshells Jen and Sol — and kissed both of them. He told her to her face.

couples.how: Both girls wanted Sincere night one; he chose Melanie.
couples.events: Still volatile after the paint-challenge fallout. On Day 8 Melanie point-blank asked Sincere if he wanted to explore Sol; he said no, but his body language screamed yes.

couples.how: KC and Aniya were the last two standing on night one and coupled by default.
couples.events: Quietest couple of Day 8 — no new bombshell drama touched them, a relative calm after KC's 'blessed' comment cooled off.

couples.how: Bombshell Kayda chose Zach at the Day 5 recoupling after he was left by Kenzie.
couples.events: Looked locked in until Day 8, when Bryce announced he'd pull Kayda for a chat — leaving Zach admitting he was suddenly 'in a weird spot.'

couples.how: Bombshell Corbin picked Kenzie first at the Day 5 recoupling, ending her couple with Zach.
couples.events: Tested by bombshell Caleb: Kenzie kissed Caleb in the challenge but told Corbin she was thinking of HIM the whole time — then confronted Melanie for pulling Corbin for a chat.

timeline.title: First Coupling
notes: 6 men, 5 women (Vasana removed pre-villa). Gabriel left single.

pairs.txt: Trinity → Bryce (only woman to pick him)

timeline.title: Bombshells Arrive
notes: Corbin & Kayda enter as the first bombshells.

timeline.title: First Recoupling (girls' choice)
notes: Corbin picked first despite girls' night. Sean left single.

timeline.title: Dumping + 3 Bombshells
notes: Sean dumped (single). Sol, Jen & Caleb storm the slumber-party challenge.

pairs.txt: Sol enters — eyes Corbin, KC, Sincere
Jen enters — 'here to take a man'

timeline.title: Bombshells Detonate (vote delayed)
notes: America's Vote results held to Ep 9 (app issues). No recoupling yet — but the new trio crack open three couples.

pairs.txt: Gabriel kisses Jen AND Sol — tells Beatriz
Bryce pulls Kayda — Zach 'in a weird spot'
Sincere eyes Sol (says no, means yes)
Kenzie kisses Caleb — but 'thinking of Corbin'

drama.title: Five couples form on night one
drama.sum: A doors-and-questions game set the first five couples. Gabriel was the odd man out, left single.
drama.out: First couples locked: Trinity+Bryce, Sean+Beatriz, Sincere+Melanie, Zach+Kenzie, KC+Aniya.

drama.title: Vasana Montgomery removed pre-villa
drama.sum: Days before premiere, videos surfaced of Vasana using racist language. Peacock cut her from the cast.
drama.out: Never entered the villa; villa opened with 11 islanders.

drama.title: Double bombshell twist
drama.sum: Corbin and Kayda entered during the first challenge, immediately shaking the original couplings.
drama.out: Both set their sights on taken islanders (Kenzie and Zach).

drama.title: Sincere & Melanie's volatile streak
drama.sum: The couple cycled through repeated arguments ('left, right and sideways') before reconciling.

drama.title: First recoupling reshuffles the villa
drama.ppl: Beatriz, Gabriel, Corbin, Kenzie, Kayda, Zach, Sean
drama.sum: Girls' choice night — but bombshell Corbin picked first. Beatriz left Sean for Gabriel; Corbin took Kenzie; Kayda took Zach.
drama.out: Sean left without a partner and vulnerable.

drama.title: Sean dumped from the villa
drama.sum: Left single after Beatriz recoupled with Gabriel, Sean was dumped and sent home immediately.
drama.out: First eliminated islander of S8. Villa down to 12.

drama.title: Paint-challenge kiss sparks jealousy
drama.sum: Blindfolded, Melanie locked Sincere and Corbin into a long back-and-forth kissing loop, infuriating Sincere.

drama.title: KC's 'blessed' comment
drama.sum: KC joked he felt 'blessed' by the bombshell arrivals; Aniya bluntly told him it wasn't funny.
drama.out: Tension in a previously steady couple.

drama.title: Triple bombshell storms the slumber party
drama.ppl: Sol Mýa, Jen Terry, Caleb McDaniel
drama.sum: Sol, Jen and Caleb crashed the lingerie challenge. Sol singled out Corbin, KC and Sincere; Caleb met the girls.
drama.out: Honeymoon phase declared over; first public vote teased.

drama.title: First public vote announced
drama.sum: Ariana announced the season's first interactive fan vote via the Love Island app.
drama.out: Power shifts to viewers — results pending.

drama.title: First public recoupling vote opens
drama.sum: Viewers vote to pair the three new bombshells: which girl couples with Caleb, and which boys couple with Jen and Sol. Voting opened 10:30pm ET and ran ~2.5 hours.
drama.out: Results were due Ep 8 but app technical issues forced a delay to Ep 9.

drama.title: America's Vote results DELAYED
drama.sum: The season's first fan-vote reveal — which islanders couple with bombshells Caleb, Jen and Sol — was held back after technical problems with the Love Island app.
drama.out: Recoupling pushed to Ep 9; couples stay intact one more night.

drama.title: Gabriel kisses BOTH Jen and Sol
drama.sum: Gabriel chatted up both new bombshells and kissed each of them, then told Beatriz to her face — landing exactly the fear she'd voiced days earlier.
drama.out: Gabriel & Beatriz crack wide open; her insecurity confirmed.

drama.title: Bryce makes a move on Kayda
drama.sum: Bryce told Zach he wanted to pull Kayda for a chat and explore the connection — the first crack in the rock-solid Trinity+Bryce pair and a direct threat to Zach+Kayda.
drama.out: Zach admits he's suddenly 'in a weird spot.'

drama.title: Kenzie kisses Caleb, hearts Corbin
drama.sum: Kenzie kissed bombshell Caleb but told Corbin she was thinking of him the whole time — then confronted Melanie for pulling Corbin aside for a chat.
drama.out: Corbin+Kenzie tested but holding; Kenzie vs Melanie tension.

drama.title: Melanie pushes Sincere toward Sol
drama.sum: Melanie asked Sincere outright if he wanted to explore Sol. He said no — but everything about him said yes.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Gabriel left single as the odd man out.

rows.label: Arrivals
rows.tx: Bombshells Corbin Mims & Kayda Reese Bosse enter during the first challenge.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Corbin and Kayda target Kenzie and Zach.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Sincere & Melanie's arguments escalate, then settle.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Bombshells deepen connections; tension builds ahead of the recoupling.

rows.label: Recoupling
rows.tx: Girls' choice. Beatriz→Gabriel, Corbin→Kenzie, Kayda→Zach; Trinity+Bryce, Sincere+Melanie, KC+Aniya stay.

rows.label: Dumping
rows.tx: Sean left single and was dumped from the villa.

rows.label: Arrivals
rows.tx: Triple bombshell: Sol Mýa, Jen Terry & Caleb McDaniel crash the slumber-party challenge.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Melanie's paint-challenge kiss with Corbin angers Sincere; KC's 'blessed' joke upsets Aniya.

rows.label: Vote
rows.tx: First public fan vote of the season announced.

rows.label: Vote
rows.tx: First public recoupling vote opens — fans pick partners for bombshells Caleb, Jen & Sol.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: The three bombshells stir up the freshly recoupled villa; couples brace for the results.

rows.label: Pending
rows.tx: Vote results were due Thursday Jun 11 (Ep 8) — a recoupling looms.

rows.label: Vote Delayed
rows.tx: America's Vote results held to Ep 9 after Love Island app technical issues — no recoupling tonight.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Gabriel kisses both Jen & Sol and tells Beatriz; Bryce moves to pull Kayda, rattling Zach.

rows.label: Drama
rows.tx: Kenzie kisses Caleb but says she was thinking of Corbin, then confronts Melanie; Melanie nudges Sincere toward Sol.

trinity.c: Enters villa. Only woman to pick Bryce — first couple of the season.
Stays with Bryce at the recoupling.
Kisses every boy in the paint challenge before locking onto Bryce.
Faces her first scare as Bryce talks about exploring bombshell-adjacent Kayda.

bryce.c: Reflects on Sean's exit; reaffirms with Trinity.
Tells Zach he'll pull Kayda to explore the connection — his first wandering eye.

gabriel.c: Chosen by Beatriz at the recoupling — first couple.
Reassures Beatriz in Portuguese/Spanish; she flags a lack of deep talks.
Kisses BOTH Jen and Sol, then admits it to Beatriz.

beatriz.c: Voices fear Gabriel may chase a new arrival.
Her fear comes true — Gabriel tells her he kissed both new bombshells.

sincere.c: Enters villa. Wanted by Aniya & Melanie; picks Melanie.
Volatile arguments with Melanie, then reconcile.
Furious over Melanie's long kiss with Corbin in the challenge.
Asked by Melanie if he wants to explore Sol — says no, but clearly tempted.

melanie.c: Enters villa. Chosen by Sincere over Aniya.
Drawn-out paint-challenge kiss with Corbin sparks drama.
Pulls Corbin for a chat (angering Kenzie); tests Sincere over Sol.

kc.c: Enters villa. Coupled with Aniya (last two standing).
'Blessed' bombshell joke upsets Aniya; Sol names him a target.
Stays out of the bombshell chaos; quietest of the boys tonight.

aniya.c: Enters villa. Wanted Sincere; ends up with KC.
Couple with KC holds steady while others crack.

zach.c: Loses Kenzie to Corbin; recouples with bombshell Kayda.
Learns Bryce wants to pull Kayda — admits he's 'in a weird spot.'

kayda.c: Says Zach makes her feel safe and comfortable.
Becomes Bryce's target — Zach's security suddenly shaky.

corbin.c: Enters as a bombshell during the first challenge.
Picks Kenzie first, breaking up Zach & Kenzie.
Pulled into Melanie's paint-challenge kiss; gushes over Kenzie.
Reassured by Kenzie (she 'thought of him' kissing Caleb); pulled by Melanie.

kenzie.c: Chosen by bombshell Corbin, ending her couple with Zach.
Kisses Caleb but tells Corbin she thought of him; confronts Melanie.

sol.c: Enters as a bombshell. Singles out Corbin, KC & Sincere.
Kissed by Gabriel; circled by a tempted Sincere.

jen.c: Enters as a bombshell. 'Here to take one of their men.'
Kissed by Gabriel as she works her way into the villa.

caleb.c: Enters as the night's third bombshell. Meets the girls right away.
Kisses Kenzie in the challenge — but she says her heart's with Corbin.

sean.c: Left single after Beatriz picks Gabriel.
Dumped from the villa and sent home.

vasana.c: Removed from the cast before entering after racist videos surfaced.
